articles.headline: OpenAI Shuts Down Sora Video Application, Ending $1 Billion Disney Partnership
articles.summary: OpenAI abruptly terminated its Sora video-making application, resulting in the collapse of a $1 billion partnership with Disney. The shutdown marks a significant shift in OpenAI's product strategy and represents a major setback for the company's video generation ambitions.

articles.headline: NVIDIA Launches the Nemotron Coalition at GTC 2026
articles.summary: NVIDIA announced the launch of the Nemotron Coalition at GTC 2026, uniting partners to advance AI model development. The initiative focuses on collaborative efforts to push the boundaries of AI capabilities using NVIDIA's hardware. This move aims to accelerate innovation in the chips and hardware sector.
